title: How to Name a QP on Your Licence
alt: Five steps to name a Qualified Person on an MIA

items.label: Confirm eligibility and scope
items.desc: Map the QP's qualifications and experience to your product types

items.label: Define authority in writing
items.desc: Set reporting line, decision rights and access to batch data

items.label: Set out arrangements clearly
items.desc: Agree scope, deputising and availability for contract or multi-site

items.label: Submit the variation
items.desc: Add or change the named QP via the MHRA licence variation

items.label: Brief and embed
items.desc: Induct the QP into site, systems and product before certifying
